Subject: Q&A for Current Employees
Message:
We have received the Q&A for current Enron employees.  The Q&A is posted on the Intranet at http://home.enron.com/updates/qa.html  
The posted information may not address all of your questions as quickly as you deserve, but a team is working to provide accurate responses to your most important questions about employee benefits, expense payments and so on.  Be sure to continue checking this web site for updated information.
If the posted info does not address your concerns, you may send your questions to questions@enron.com
Again,
